name: FastAPI Users (Authentication Library for FastAPI)

auth.notes: JWT bearer tokens and cookie-based auth out of the box

agent_readiness.notes: Complete user management for FastAPI. Registration, login, password reset, email verification, OAuth (Google/Facebook/GitHub). JWT + cookie backends. SQLAlchemy/Beanie/MongoDB database adapters. Custom User model via generics. app.include_router(fastapi_users.get_auth_router(jwt_backend)). current_active_user dependency. FastAPI dependency injection. Social OAuth via httpx-oauth. The standard auth solution for FastAPI apps.

gotchas: Breaking changes between major versions (v9→v10, v12→v13)
Customization requires understanding FastAPI generics pattern
OAuth social login needs httpx-oauth package
best_when: FastAPI apps needing complete user auth without building from scratch
SaaS apps with JWT login, registration, password reset, email verification
Async SQLAlchemy or MongoDB backend user storage
avoid_when: Enterprise SSO (use python-keycloak or authlib instead)
summary: FastAPI Users provides complete user management for FastAPI: registration, JWT/cookie auth, password reset, email verification, OAuth (Google/GitHub/Facebook). Database adapters for SQLAlchemy and MongoDB/Beanie. current_active_user dependency injection. app.include_router(fastapi_users.get_auth_router()). The standard authentication library for FastAPI applications.
